title: Living in Boulder blog 4 - 6 - 2017:  20 Area Dimensions

enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a brief daily vlog update from Boulder, discussing tedious progress on a mapping or reference page project, his excitement about finishing and reaching a milestone, and his interest in recreating a Roman Legion camp and army using miniatures after listening to a book about Roman military history.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: tedious but making progress; eager to finish the page and reach the corner milestone
excited to build it after being inspired by a book on Roman military history
finds it useful for memorization and inspiration

entities: Front Highness (likely Frontinus or similar Roman author)
